mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.following_id as userId, u.nickname as username, u.avatar, f.create_time as followTime, u.signature, u.gender FROM follow f INNER JOIN users u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 0 AND u.is_deleted = false ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.follower_id as userId, u.nickname as username, u.avatar, f.create_time as followTime, u.signature, u.gender FROM follow f INNER JOIN users u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 0 AND u.is_deleted = false ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT follower_id, following_id, status FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id IN
#{targetId}

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 2 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM ( SELECT follower_id, following_id FROM follow WHERE ((follower_id = #{userId1} AND following_id = #{userId2}) OR (follower_id = #{userId2} AND following_id = #{userId1})) AND status = 0 ) AS mutual_follows
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE following_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
